market_pulse: Weekend domination confirmed: OMNIA and LIV Beach lead talent lineups (Aoki/Tiësto/Levi); competitors emphasize countdown/announcement content while LIV maintains consistent presence.

content_gaps.description: OMNIA, XS, and Zouk heavily featuring countdown content to weekend events. LIV Beach posting lineups but minimal interactive countdown/countdown-timer visual content.
content_gaps.suggested_action: Deploy countdown stickers/timer posts for FRI/SAT/SUN lineup on LIV Beach IG/TT (Sommer Ray, Tiësto, Kromi).

content_gaps.description: Competitors showing staff uniforms, setup, preparation content. LIV Beach mentioned staff uniforms in Fontainebleau bow detail but minimal ongoing BTS content.
content_gaps.suggested_action: Create BTS reels: bartender prep, stage setup, DJ booth action before Friday event.

content_gaps.description: Hakkasan and Zouk heavily leveraging creator tags and mentions. OMNIA posts feature heavy @ mentions of performers. LIV posting lineups but fewer collab-style posts.
content_gaps.suggested_action: Tag @sommerray @tiesto @kromi_music in Stories with 'See you Friday/Saturday/Sunday' content.
